turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Booking a Doctor’s Appointment

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hello… I have appointment with doctor. But I think I need change.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, I can help you with that. Let me just check first — do you already have an appointment booked with us?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. I booked yesterday. Today afternoon.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. So you have an appointment scheduled for this afternoon. Can you tell me what time the appointment is?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It is… three thirty.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, thank you. And you’d like to change this appointment to a different time, is that right?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. Because I have class. I forgot about class before.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand. No problem. We can look at other available times for you. Would you like to move it to later today, or to another day?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Um… maybe tomorrow. Morning is better.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, let me check tomorrow morning for you. We have an appointment available at  a.m. and another one at  a.m. Which time would you prefer?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: 9… Sorry, 9 in morning?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, 9 a.m. in the morning.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. 9 a.m. is good.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great. I can move your appointment to tomorrow at 9 a.m. Before I do that, I just need to confirm a few details. Is this still for the same problem you mentioned before?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. Still headache. But it is little better now.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know. And just to check, do you have a Medicare card, or will this be a private appointment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Medicare… I think no. I am international student.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that’s fine. In that case, it will remain a private appointment, and the consultation fee will stay the same. Do you remember the fee we discussed?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It was… Eighty? Or eighteen? I’m not sure.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: It’s eighty dollars — eight zero — dollars.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. Eighty dollars. Same price.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s correct. Now, I’ll cancel today’s appointment and rebook you for tomorrow at 9 a.m. Please make sure you arrive about ten minutes early.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Ten minutes early… So ?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, exactly.  would be perfect.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. I understand now.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Just to confirm, your appointment is now booked for tomorrow morning at 9 a.m. Is there anything else you’d like to ask or change?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Um… If I feel better, can I cancel again?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, you can cancel, but please let us know at least two hours before the appointment.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Two hours… before? Okay. I will call if I need.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s great. Thank you for letting us know. We’ll see you tomorrow morning.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. Thank you very much.
